reviews.review_title: It sucks. You can’t even reload the AK.
reviews.review_description: It sucks. She can’t even reload the ￼Ak

developer_response.body:
Hi Imgoingpro429,

Upon your feedback we have verified again the gun is reloading properly. 
It seems there may have been some confusion about the reloading process.please follow these steps:

1. Grab the magazine with your left controller and push it upwards towards the gun.
2. Pull the re-loader, located on the right side of the gun, backward, and then release it.
3. The gun will reload automatically.
We hope this clears things up! If you're still having any issues, feel free to reach out, and we'll be happy to assist further. Thank you for your feedback, we are working on the game to make it more fun. Your support will be a great help for us.
